{{Infobox character
| name = Nerissa
| appears_in = Traveler's Gate
| introduced = [[The Crimson Vault (novel)|The Crimson Vault]]
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Nerissa]] is [[Indirial]]'s wife and had ice-blue eyes.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c1">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 1</ref>}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Nerissa]] is [[Indirial]]'s wife and was held in a cage.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c17">''City of Light'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Nerissa]] was pressed against the edge of her cage.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c19">''City of Light'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
